This reduction shall be a provider liability, and the provider shall not bill the beneficiary

CMS may waive the consequences of failure to submit a timely-filed NOA if it is 
determined that a circumstance encountered by a home health agency is exceptional and 
qualifies for waiver of the consequence. An exceptional circumstance may be due to, but 
is not limited to the following: 

• Fires, floods,
